overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban environment. The player walks along a sidewalk past a commercial building, turns at an intersection, and crosses a wet street while a vintage car passes by.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to a commercial building with illuminated signage

entered.detail: large commercial building with illuminated 'CLAUDRON SUPER MALL' signage and glass facade
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
tall wooden utility pole with glowing street light illuminating the rain
wet concrete sidewalk reflecting street lights and building signage
red sedan parked along the curb near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk at night next to a commercial mall building. The wet pavement reflects the glow of street lamps and the building's illuminated signage. Palm trees line the street while a red car sits parked along the curb. Heavy rain falls steadily, creating a moody atmosphere with artificial lighting cutting through the darkness.

events.description: turns right at the corner to face the intersection and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner to face the crosswalk and oncoming traffic

entered.detail: wide multi-lane street intersection with traffic markings
marked pedestrian crossing with red painted curb
tall downtown buildings with illuminated windows visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the corner to face a wide intersection. The mall building falls behind as the view opens to the crosswalk and distant city lights. The street lamp shifts to the left side while the wet road stretches ahead, marked by red curbs and traffic lines. Rain continues to fall heavily across the open intersection.

events.description: black vintage sedan drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet street while monitoring passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black vintage sedan driving through the intersection, passing in front of the camera from right to left

entered.detail: yellow fire hydrant on the opposite sidewalk
concrete sidewalk on the far side of the street with grass verge

segments.scene_description: Crossing the multi-lane street through heavy rain. A black vintage sedan passes by from the right, its headlights cutting through the downpour. The yellow fire hydrant on the opposite sidewalk becomes visible as the camera approaches. The wet asphalt reflects the street lights and vehicle lights, creating shimmering patterns on the ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that eventually opens into a wide, shimmering city intersection. It begins by gliding past a commercial mall building, where the wet pavement reflects illuminated signage and street lamps beneath a canopy of palm trees. As the camera reaches the corner, it turns right, leaving the building behind to reveal a broad expanse of rain-slicked road and distant city lights. The scene then shifts into a crossing of the multi-lane street, where the headlights of a passing black vintage sedan cut through the heavy downpour. Finally, the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk, moving past shimmering asphalt reflections toward a bright yellow fire hydrant.
